text: Interrupt: When a Bushi character you control leaves play - if it is dishonored, honor it. If it is a Berserker, it gains courtesy.
flavorText: "They are weapons. But weapons must be cleaned, guided - and laid down when broken. That is my task."
name: Caretaker of the Dead Eyes

text: This character cannot receive dishonored status tokens. Interrupt: When the effects of an event would initiate during a conflict in which this character is participating, sacrifice a character - cancel those effects.
name: Grizzled Strategist

text: Reaction: After a character leaves play during a conflict - give this character +2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: "Even if they fall, their strength will endure."
name: Hiruma Harrower

text: Reaction: After you lose a conflict, dishonor and sacrifice a participating character. Choose an opposing character (choose up to 2 characters if you sacrificed a Berserker) – dishonor each of the chosen characters. Draw a card.
flavorText: "Die well, and ascend. Die badly, and drag them down with you."
name: A Bad Death

text: Reaction: After a Berserker character you control attacks alone - characters with less than 3[conflict-military] cannot be declared as defenders
flavorText: "Better to yield than face a man with nothing left to lose."
name: Reckless Assault

text: Conflict Action: Initiate a [conflict-military] duel with a Berserker character you control - your opponent may allow you to draw two cards and take an additional action to refuse the duel. Otherwise resolve the duel. The loser of the duel does not contribute its skill toward the resolution of this conflict.
name: Unbridled Rage

text: Berserker character only. Set attached character's glory to 0. [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Until the end of the conflict, attached character cannot be moved home and has +2[conflict-military]. At the end of the conflict, sacrifice attached character unless you contributed more than double your opponent's skill to resolution of this conflict.
name: Dead Eyes

text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province - search the top 5 cards of your conflict deck for an attachment with printed cost 1 or less and put it into play attached to a character. Shuffle.
flavorText: "Perfection does not guide the Crane - the Crane guide perfection."
name: Excellence, Attained

text: Reaction: After you play a Spell card - gain 1 honor. (Limit twice per round.)
flavorText: In the whispering fields the wind taught her that virtue, like grain, must be cultivated.
name: Asahina Momoko

text: While this character is dishonored, it cannot be chosen as the target of an opponent's event.
flavorText: "The Dōji proclaim their honor. The Kakita duel for it. We Daidōji bleed so that both can keep it."
name: Observant Daidōji

text: Conflict Action: Bow a Shugenja character - the attacked province gets +4 strength this conflict. With Air affinity, you do not lose honor from this conflict being unopposed.
flavorText: There can be no siege against the sky itself.
name: Castle of Air

text: Play only if you control a Shugenja character. Conflict Action: Spend 1 honor or 1 fate and choose a participating dishonored character - taint it. With Air affinity, gain 1 honor.
flavorText: Cloaked in Lord Moon's gloom, suspicions light upon those who shun the gaze of Lady Sun.
name: Eyes of the Serpent

text: Conflict Action: Choose a participating Bushi or Scout character you control - that character gets +2[conflict-military] for the conflict. If you lose the conflict, gain 1 honor.
flavorText: "Strength fades, and steel fails. But Bushidō endures."
name: Two-Folded Virtue

text: Bushi character only. Ancestral. Restricted. While attached character is dishonored, set its glory to 0. Reaction: After attached character wins a conflict while dishonored - gain 1 honor.
name: Ancestral Kabuto

text: Thriving. Interrupt: When a non-unique character you control would leave play, sacrifice this holding - put that character into this province instead, adding each attachment on it to its owner's hand.
name: Road to Shakyaku Mura

text: Action: Choose a Temple card you control - ready it. You may use its ability an additional time this round.
flavorText: "My lords honor the Fortunes with poetry and incense. I offer clean water and swept stone. Both are heard."
name: Kayo, The Shrinetender

text: Reaction: After fate is placed on a ring by one of your card effects - ready this character.
flavorText: "The ink remembers the answer long before the world learns the question."
name: Tattooed Man

text: Conflict Action: Choose a Monk character on your side and an unclaimed ring - claim that ring as [conflict-military] and gain all fate on it. That character gets +2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: "Fast as lightning, a cry as loud as thunder. Then empty as the calm after the storm. That is how to strike."
name: Strike as the Elements

text: Conflict action: Choose a participating Monk character you control and a participating character your opponent controls - give your opponent's character -2[conflict-military] and -2[conflict-political], plus an additional -2[conflict-military] and -2[conflict-political] for each unclaimed ring with fate on it. If your chosen character is Tattooed and your opponent's character now contributes no skill toward the current conflict, injure it. (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: The Hundred Hand Strike

text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Choose up to two Monk characters you control - move them to the conflict. [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Choose a Bushi character you control with at least two attachments - ready that character and move it to the conflict.
name: Twenty-four Steps

text: Attach to a Monk character you control. Attached character gains Tattooed. Ephemeral. Action: Choose an opponent and 2 Tattoo or Kihō cards cards in your conflict discard pile. That opponent chooses 1 of those cards - shuffle the chosen card into your deck and remove the other from the game.
name: Nightingale Tattoo

text: Cannot be a stronghold province. Reaction: After a conflict is declared against this province - while resolving this conflict, characters count 1 instead of their [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skill.
flavorText: "The waters do not care for status. Glory and grime are both washed away."
name: River Crossing

text: Conflict Action: Discard the Imperial Favor and choose a character on the enemy side - move that character home and bow it.
flavorText: "Natsuko-sama does not know night from day. Once she gets her teeth into a task she does not loosen them until it is done. Pray she does not set them on you.”
name: Ikoma Natsuko

text: Interrupt: When you would discard the Imperial Favor - discard this character instead. Conflict Action: Choose a character on the enemy side with a printed fate cost equal or lower than this character – injure this character and the chosen character.
name: Ikoma Yumiko's Dagger

text: Conflict Action: Choose a participating character you control. Your opponent must select one - give the chosen character +3[conflict-military] and +3[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict, or let you claim the Imperial Favor. (Max 1 per conflict.) (If you already have the favor, you may switch its side when you re-claim it.)
name: Ancestral Rivalry

text: Conflict Action: Choose a participating character you control - that character gets +2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. You may discard the Imperial Favor to honor that character. If you win the conflict, claim the Imperial Favor.
name: Deeds, not Words

text: Attach to character you control. Conflict Action: While attached character is attacking, sacrifice this attachment. Choose an opponent's character at home. Its controller must select one - move the chosen character to the conflict or dishonor it.
name: Imperial Adjutant

text: Reaction: After you claim the Imperial Favor - gain 1 honor. (Limit twice per round.)
flavorText: "You gave Ichiro a nickname? I’m sure he’ll be pleased." - Ikoma Yumiko
name: The Stranger

text: Action: Choose a non-stronghold province you control - move this card to that province. Then, discard each other holding in that province. Reaction: After your opponent declares a conflict against this holding's province - gain 1 honor for each conflict declared against this province this round. (Unlimited.)
name: Song of the Empty City

text: Conflict Action: Choose a character on the enemy side - that character gets -2[conflict-military] and -2[conflict-political] for each participating Scholar character you control until the end of the conflict. Then, if the chosen character contributes zero skill to the conflict, gain 1 honor.
name: Asako Shun

text: Cannot be evaded by the covert keyword. Conflict Action: Even from home, if you are defending and the attacked province has had a previous conflict declared against it this round - resolve a ring effect matching that province's element. (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Vengeful Kami

text: This character has +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] while it is participating in a conflict at a province with an element matching a trait on this character. Conflict Action: Choose one of the traits Air, Earth, Fire, Water, or Void - this character gains the chosen trait until the end of the round. Action: Shuffle this character into your deck.
name: Benevolent Lesser Kami

text: Action: Bow a Shugenja character – move up to three fate from your fate pool onto Spirit characters you control. Then, unless you have Void affinity, injure the bowed character.
flavorText: Burning incense and a soothing hymn remind them to be still.
name: Appeasing the Restless

text: Conflict Action: Choose a participating Shugenja character you control and participating character your opponent controls - for this conflict, switch the base [conflict-military] and [conflict-political] skills of your opponent's character. With Water affinity, you may also pay 1 fate to switch the printed abilities of the two chosen characters.
name: Ebb and Flow

text: Shugenja character only. Restricted. Attached character gains Water and: "Action: During a conflict, choose a Bushi character you control - give the chosen character +2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict and move it to this character’s location."
name: Tessen of the Tsunami Legion

text: Conflict Action: Discard X cards from your opponent's conflict deck, where X is the highest number of participating characters between both sides of the conflict.
flavorText: A rumor whispered once will be heard a hundred times.
name: Bayushi Rumormonger

text: This character enters play dishonored. Action: Bow this character. Choose a dishonored non-unique character controlled by an opponent - take control of that character for this phase. If that character leaves play this phase, lose 2 honor.
flavorText: “You're fallen, disgraced, less than half a man; and yet, you still have a role to play.”
name: Bayushi Shinobu

text: Interrupt: When the effects of a printed ability on a Courtier character your opponent controls would initiate, put this character into play from your hand – cancel those effects and place 1 fate on this character.
flavorText: The shoji screen slid open. All eyes turned, and their arguments scattered like startled birds.
name: Soshi Aya

text:
Play only if you control a Courtier character.
Peaceful. Action: Choose a character - for this round, remove that character's clan affiliation. That character's controller cannot honor characters during conflicts in which that character is participating. If you have the Imperial Favor, draw a card.
name: Disputed Lineage

text: Reaction: After a dishonored character commits or moves into a conflict - move it home. It cannot participate in the current conflict. (Max 1 per conflict.)
flavorText: The message was short. His absence would be long.
name: Pressure

text: Action: Bow a Courtier character and choose an honored status token on a character controlled by an opponent. That opponent must select one - either replace the honored status token with a dishonored status token, or lose 1 honor and you draw two cards. Then, you lose 2 honor if you are more honorable than that opponent.
name: We Know

text: Reaction: After a triggered ability changes the [conflict-military] or [conflict-political] skill of attached character while it is participating in a conflict – bow attached character. (Honoring or dishonoring is not considered as changing skill.)
name: Kiss of the Sea

text: Action: Sacrifice this holding and choose a character you control with printed cost 3 or less - ready that character. Then, unless you control a Storyteller character, dishonor it.
flavorText: The Unicorn do not linger where the way was lost. Before the fire dies, they will find another.
name: Campfire Counsel

text: No attachments except Weapon. This character contributes its skill even when bowed. Reaction: After you play an event during a conflict - move this character to the conflict.
name: Incessant Moto

text: Reaction: After the resolution of a conflict in which this character was defending - if you won the conflict, gain 2 honor. Otherwise, ready this character.
flavorText: She thanked the foe who tested her. Win or lose, he gave her purpose.
name: Utaku Tomoe

text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Choose a character on your side - that character gets +2[conflict-military] for the conflict. Then, you may choose a character you control and move it to the conflict or home from the conflict.
name: Cornering Maneuver

text: Conflict Action: Until you play another event, for this conflict increase the cost for each player to play each event by 1. If you control a Scout character, gain 1 fate. (An event is considered played only after it has finished resolving.)
name: Into the Storm

text: Shugenja character only. Attached character gains covert.
flavorText: In the forest, the hunter learns: what the eye doubts, it holds. Shadows cannot be held.
name: Pearl of the Balash

text: Attached character gains: "Conflict Action: Choose a participating character controlled by your opponent and a copy of that character in a discard pile - put the copy into play in the conflict under your control. At the end of the conflict, remove it from the game"
name: Strange Mirror

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – draw 1 card, gain 1 fate, and gain 1 honor.
flavorText: "This soil lay untouched for generations under the Fortunes' watch. It can bear for thrice as long."
name: Fallow Lands
